crime.value: Kidnapping and imprisonment by drugging and abduction
crime.quote: I brought her to the basement and put her carefully on the bed and tied up her ankle to the bed

victim.value: Jen/Jennett, 17-year-old girl targeted by her former teacher/boyfriend
victim.quote: Baby do you really dont reconize me? Its me Clint Hood your old boyfriend?

closed_world.value: Underground basement where victim is held captive
closed_world.quote: you can scream all you want but your under ground no ones going to hear you sweetheart

culprit_and_motive.value: Clint Hood (teacher) kidnapped Jen because he wants her to fall back in love with him
culprit_and_motive.quote: im sure shell fall back in love with me

investigator.value: Dual perspective: Jen as victim and Clint Hood as perpetrator

red_herring.value: Initial positioning as runaway case when victim was actually kidnapped by teacher
red_herring.quote: left her parents a note saying she ranaway and not to come looking for her

social_world.value: Abusive family hierarchy with powerless teenager exploited by authority figures
social_world.quote: My mom isnt the nicest parent alive i cook, i clean, i do EVERYTHING and all i get in retern is being yelled at

alibi.value: Teacher uses mandatory piano lessons as cover for extended contact with victim
alibi.quote: your step dad said he wanted you to learn panio. So insted of taking the bus home I have to take you home

reveal_mechanic.value: Perpetrator reveals identity directly to victim in basement confrontation
reveal_mechanic.quote: Baby do you really dont reconize me? Its me Clint Hood your old boyfriend?

_meta.title: ebook laurie comeaux the shadow in the hall
